risks.note: All composition + assembly + format rules are modeled; no renderer code exists yet.
Publication versions + manifest hashes are required by lineage but no registry exists.
Source-node revocation does not yet flag dependent publications (no dependency index).
Runtime-generation auditability requires assembly receipts; runtime emits none today.
Audience filters are doctrine-declared; no executable enforcement layer exists.
Lossy formats must disclose what is lost; no automated check verifies this.
Section order is governance-declared; no validator rejects reordered output.
Drift signal is named (layer 28) but has no implementation; stale publications cannot yet be flagged.
Visual-prompt format is declarative only; no pipeline consumes it (intentional in this phase).
Reviewer validation step (manual-assembly flow step 4) has no console; depends on layer-24 carry-over.
